items.description: Core libraries that all services and apps depend on. Includes @unicore/shared-types, @unicore/config, @unicore/ui, @unicore/integrations.

children.description: Define core domain types (User, Role, Agent, ERP entities), API request/response types, event types (Kafka message schemas). Export all types from package index.
Create shared ESLint config (base + Next.js + NestJS), shared Tailwind config (theme, colors, fonts), shared tsconfig base for apps/services/packages.

Initialize shadcn/ui with Tailwind. Create base components (Button, Input, Card, Dialog, Table, Toast), layout components (Sidebar, Header, PageContainer), widget components (StatCard, Chart, DataTable).
Create adapter interface (connect, disconnect, sync). Implement Stripe payment adapter, Plaid bank feed adapter, Email adapter (SMTP/SendGrid/Mailgun).

items.description: Central auth, routing, and rate limiting service (NestJS). Port 4000. Handles JWT auth, session management, request proxy to downstream services, license validation.

children.summary: API Gateway — NestJS project scaffold & Prisma config
children.description: Initialize NestJS app with TypeScript. Configure Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL schema (User, Session, ApiKey models). Setup Redis connection for sessions/cache. Configure connection pooling.

children.summary: API Gateway — JWT authentication & session management
children.description: Implement JWT token generation (access + refresh), NextAuth callback integration, auth guards (JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard), session management with Redis.

children.summary: API Gateway — Routing & proxy to downstream services
children.description: Create proxy module routing to ERP (:4100), AI Engine (:4200), RAG (:4300), Bootstrap (:4500). Implement request validation middleware. Add rate limiting (per-user, per-IP).

children.summary: API Gateway — License key validation integration
children.description: Read UNICORE_LICENSE_KEY from env. Create feature flag middleware to gate Pro features. Cache license status locally with weekly revalidation.

items.description: First-run setup flow — 6-step wizard. Includes Bootstrap API service (NestJS, port 4500) and Onboarding UI (Next.js, port 3100).

children.summary: Bootstrap API — Template loader & provisioning engine
children.description: Read 7 JSON templates from templates/. Provisioning engine creates DB schemas, roles, agents from config. Config writer generates unicore.config.json. Re-run wizard endpoint (POST /bootstrap/reset).

Step 1: Business Profile (type, name, currency, language, timezone). Step 2: Team & Roles. Step 3: AI Agents config (toggle, channels, autonomy, LLM provider). Step 4: ERP Modules toggle. Step 5: Integrations. Step 6: Review & Launch.

items.description: Main operations UI (Next.js, port 3000). Includes layout, widget framework, settings pages, and template-driven KPIs.

children.summary: Dashboard — Layout & navigation with role-based menu
children.description: App shell with sidebar navigation. Role-based menu rendering. NextAuth session integration with api-gateway.

Dynamic widget grid loaded from unicore.config.json. Widget components: revenue, orders, inventory, channels, MRR, churn, signups, active_users, foot_traffic, top_products, audience, engagement, content_calendar, billable_hours, clients, pipeline. Data fetching with SWR/React Query.

General settings (business name, currency, language, timezone). Team & Roles management. AI Agents configuration. ERP Modules toggle. Integrations management. License status & activation. Re-run Wizard trigger.

items.description: CRM, Orders, Inventory, Invoicing, Expenses, Reports (NestJS, port 4100). Lightweight ERP designed for 1-5 person teams.

children.description: Contact model (profiles, interaction history, lead scoring, pipeline stages). Order model (quotes, orders, fulfillment tracking, returns). Inventory model (SKU, stock levels, multi-warehouse, low-stock thresholds). Invoice model (generation, payment tracking, recurring billing, tax calc). Expense model (receipt capture, categories, monthly summaries). Report views (revenue, P&L, cash flow).

Contacts CRUD + search + pipeline. Orders CRUD + fulfillment state machine. Inventory CRUD + stock deduction + low-stock alerts. Invoicing CRUD + payment recording + recurring. Expenses CRUD + categorization + receipt upload. Reports aggregation (revenue, P&L, cash flow).
Publish order.created, order.updated, order.fulfilled. Publish inventory.low, inventory.restocked. Publish invoice.created, invoice.overdue, invoice.paid.

items.description: LLM orchestration and prompt routing (port 4200). RAG pipeline for embeddings, retrieval, context (port 4300). Qdrant vector DB integration.

children.summary: AI Engine — LLM provider abstraction & prompt management
children.description: LLM provider abstraction (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama). Prompt template management (per-agent, per-template). Token usage tracking and cost monitoring. Provider failover (primary to fallback).

children.summary: RAG Service — Qdrant integration & retrieval pipeline
children.description: Qdrant vector DB integration (embeddings CRUD). Document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding, storage). Context retrieval endpoint (query to relevant chunks). Memory scoping per agent/workspace.

items.description: Multi-agent orchestration via WebSocket (port 18789). Router Agent + 7 specialist agents. Each agent has own system prompt, tools, and memory scope.

children.summary: OpenClaw Gateway — WebSocket hub & agent lifecycle
children.description: WebSocket hub (ws://localhost:18789). Agent registration and lifecycle management. Inter-agent message routing. Health check and heartbeat monitoring.

children.summary: Router Agent — Intent classification & task delegation
children.description: Intent classification prompt. Task delegation logic (route to specialist). Fallback handling (unknown intents). Always-on agent.

Comms Agent (email/social drafting, inbox triage, outreach). Finance Agent (transaction categorization, cash flow forecasting, invoicing). Growth Agent (funnel analysis, A/B tests, ad monitoring). Ops Agent (task management, scheduling, projects). Research Agent (market intel, competitors, news). ERP Agent (natural language CRUD). Builder Agent (code generation, deployment automation).

items.description: Event-driven automation via Kafka (NestJS, port 4400). Consumes events from ERP, triggers agent actions, manages workflow state.

children.description: Connect to Kafka brokers. Create topic consumers (order.created, inventory.low, invoice.overdue). Event deserialization and validation.
Workflow definition schema (trigger to actions). Action executors (call agent, update ERP, send notification). Workflow state tracking (running, completed, failed).
New order to invoice to confirmation email. Low stock to reorder task to owner notification. Invoice overdue to payment reminder to flag in reports.

items.description: Key validation, feature flags, machine binding (unicore-license repo). Includes license-api (NestJS), admin-dashboard (Next.js), key-generator CLI, shared crypto and types packages.

children.description: License, FeatureFlag, MachineFingerprint, ValidationResponse interfaces. Edition enums (community, pro) with feature mappings.
RSA key pair generation for license signing. Key encoder: license data to UC-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX format. Key validator: verify signature, check expiry, detect tampering. Machine fingerprint hashing.

Prisma schema (License, MachineBinding, AuditLog, FeatureFlag tables). CRUD endpoints (/api/v1/licenses). Validation endpoint (POST /api/v1/validate). Feature flag distribution (GET /api/v1/features/:key). Machine binding and transfer. Rate limiting and admin auth.
Admin login with ADMIN_SECRET. License list, search, detail views. Key generation UI. Usage analytics charts. Machine binding management.
Generate command with edition/expiry/features flags. Validate command for offline key verification. Batch generation from CSV.

items.description: Advanced features gated by license key (unicore-pro repo). 9 packages: license-client, rbac, agents-pro, channels, workflows-advanced, branding, sso, audit, agent-builder.

children.description: HTTP client for license server communication. Machine fingerprint generation (cross-platform). Offline validation cache (30-day grace). NestJS injectable module with license guards.

RBAC data model (Role, Permission, RoleAssignment) + Prisma schema. RoleService, PermissionService, AuthorizationService. Default 5 roles (Owner, Operator, Marketer, Finance, Viewer) seed. Bootstrap wizard Step 2 integration.
Agent definition interface + prompt templates. Industry-specific prompts per business template. Agent spawning/lifecycle via OpenClaw Gateway.

Channel adapter framework (base interface + registry). Social channels: LINE, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, WhatsApp, Telegram. Team channels: Slack, Discord, Email, WebChat. Channel management dashboard UI. Channel-to-agent binding.
Workflow DSL (JSON/YAML with branching, loops, parallel). Execution engine with state management. Workflow template library (5+ pre-built). Visual workflow builder UI.
Branding config storage (colors, logo, fonts). CSS theme generator from config. Remove UniCore branding option. Branding management UI.
SAML 2.0 Service Provider implementation. IdP integration (Azure AD, Okta, Google Workspace). JIT user provisioning from SAML groups. SSO configuration UI.
AuditLog data model (immutable, indexed). NestJS middleware for automatic action logging. Data change tracking (before/after diffs). Audit dashboard with search, filter, export.
Custom agent definition storage + versioning. Agent tool registry (discoverable tools). Agent prompt editor with preview. Agent builder wizard (6-step). Agent testing and debugging simulator.
